title: VIOLATION: rust/lichen-kiss/src/bridge.rs unsigned frames
description: Policy: 06-security.md §8.3 VIOLATION. File: rust/lichen-kiss/src/bridge.rs. Status: NON-COMPLIANT. encode_payload_as_frame (L263-297) creates frames with signature: Signature::Absent (L292). This violates spec 8.3 which states 'Every originated frame carries a Schnorr signature.' The convenience method bypasses the link layer signing path. Fix: Either remove this method, require caller to sign separately, or integrate with LinkLayer::build_frame().
